author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--rules-local
content:
Plan: 6 areas to modify:
1. init.rs GITIGNORE_MANAGED_SECTION — add .crosslink/rules.local/ to gitignore
2. init.rs .crosslink/.gitignore — add rules.local/ entry
3. init.rs init logic — create rules.local/ directory during init
4. prompt-guard.py load_all_rules() — merge rules.local/ over rules/ (same-name override, additive for new files)
5. prompt-guard.py load_tracking_rules() — check rules.local/ first
6. pre-web-check.py load_web_rules() — check rules.local/ first
7. context.rs — show rules.local/ files in context measure
8. workflow.rs — skip drift detection for rules.local/ (they're intentional overrides)

Key design decision: rules.local/ files override same-named rules/ files entirely (no merging within a file). New files in rules.local/ are additive.
